io.papermc.paper.registry.data.PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder

Package
Description
io.papermc.paper.registry.data
Collection of registry entry types that may be created or modified via the RegistryEvent.
io.papermc.paper.registry.event
This package contains events related to the Paper registry system.

    Description
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder.assetId(Key assetId)
    Sets the asset id of the painting, which is the location of the sprite to use.
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder

    Sets the author of the painting.
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder

    Sets the height of the painting in blocks.
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder

    Sets the title of the painting.
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder
    PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder.width(@org.jetbrains.annotations.Range(from=1L, to=16L) int width)
    Sets the width of the painting in blocks.
